theorems.paper_name: Exact mean ranking on separable trap

theorems.note: Two-sided Hoeffding with 128n² constant fully proven in GapClosureSolutions.lean via upper/lower tail splitting and union bound. hoeffding_batch_sample_complexity derives the algebraic 1/4 failure bound.

theorems.paper_name: Ideal EA runtime O(n log n)
theorems.note: Proven via additive drift: witness T = n/δ ≤ 2n² from δ ≥ 1/(2n). G1/G2/G3 consumed in proof body. Previously axiomatized.
Coupling construction, Markov argument, geometric restart all formalized in SimulationCoupling.lean. Level-count preservation proven in GapClosureSolutions.lean. Runtime bound T ≤ 4B fully derived.
Epoch decomposition, geometric restart, reservoir persistence, and pathwise conditional independence all proven. coupling_epoch_success is a theorem.
Witness veto interaction fully proven: Δj=2, Δi=-4, min-drop ≤ -4, interaction gap 3(n-1). T_n case split and unique saddle covered by trap_fitness_all_ones_optimal.
Algebraic bound A·d·(1/n)·(1-1/n)^(n-1) fully derived from sbm_transition_prob. Distance monotonicity proven in GapClosureSolutions.

level_based_gen_bound.note: Proved via additive drift: T ≤ n/δ ≤ 2n²

negative_drift_theorem.note: Existential witness via exp bound. Full measure-theoretic OST proof in DriftTheorems/NegativeDrift.lean

exact_copy_prob.note: Proven in SimultaneousPersistence.lean via pow_pos and pow_le_pow_left

expected_wiring.note: hoeffding_two_sided_bound proves the measure-theoretic bound; hoeffding_batch_sample_complexity derives the 1/4 algebraic threshold
